title: A messenger from 5,000 years ago
overview: Koichi was taken in by the Komi family and grew up as a very ordinary high school student. But he was the successor of the "Tower of Babel" which is also written in the Old Testament! Koichi, who had sensed that he would be invited there from his dreams every day, visited the Tower of Babel standing quietly in the desert near Baghdad, despite the opposition of Mr. and Mrs. and his daughter Yumiko...

title: Goriki, the rock giant of fear
overview: "Defeat Babel before he descends the Himalayas!" Yomi, who came into contact with Babel II and felt that he would become his enemy, immediately gave orders to his subordinates who believed in him. And I tried to find out the position of the Tower of Babel, which I couldn't read with my telepathic ability, by letting my subordinates fight.

title: Dark Emperor Yomi
overview: Still worried about Koichi, who could not be heard from, the Komi family found his name in the seeker section of the newspaper advertisement. It was released by Sonomiya, who was a classmate with Koichi, but Yomi used the advertisement. He sent his subordinates Robinson and Joby to try to stop the breath of Babil II with his close friends.

title: Three Servants
overview: A lobotomy surgery that brainwashes humans with surgery that came to light by analyzing the corpse of Yomi's subordinate, Joby. Yomi is concerned that Dr. Kuraishi and his assistant Arai, who were involved in the analysis, knew too much about the secret, and plans to make them loyal subordinates by adding surgery to them.

title: This is telekinesis!
overview: Nise Babil II attacked banks all over the world. It was Babil II who couldn't measure Yomi's true intentions, but it was a time-buying strategy aimed at disturbing the disturbance. And behind it, a field was steadily being built to separate the three servants from Babil II. Babil II is in a big pinch where he is taken by a jet and blocks the telepathy to his servants!

title: The Tower of Evil
overview: It was Babil II who defeated Yomi, but his exhaustion was also intense. It was at that time that the Chigris army deployed around the Tower of Babel. At first, I thought it was just an exercise, and Babil II returned to the treatment pod to recover his physical strength. But it was a unit deployed to find the Tower of Babel, a minions of Yomi who thought he had defeated.

title: Another Commander
overview: A large passenger plane crashed. The only survivor is the commander-in-chief of the whole army of the National Security Bureau. However, Yumiko, who was waiting for the return of her daughter Kinuko and Koichi, also known as Babil II, doubts that he seems to be a different person. As if to prove that suspicion, what is the identity of the commander who appoints Yumiko and Kinuko as bodyguards as if they were shields for Babil II?

title: The Devil's Secret Base
overview: A neutron bomb explosion test carried out on the west coast of Africa. Babil II was horrified by the power of another weapon that can be said to be a nuclear bomb that has no physical destructive power and kills only humans with powerful radiation. Moreover, it is said that Yomi is the only one who has enough scientific power to make it, and immediately embarks on an investigation.

title: The Rocky Mountains of Fear
overview: Josef, a hypnotist under Yomi, called Babel II to the Rocky Mountains in Canada with a technique on the announcer. Because Joseph, who was held by a nearby villager, tried to sleep, Babil II arrived at the village at the foot of the Rocky Mountains and was attacked by the villagers.

title: Special Robot Balan
overview: A sand storm that covers the tower of Babel. The generation system, which is the largest means of defense, has been developed. Yomi's reconnaissance plane comes only at such times. It seemed that he got out of the crisis by being driven away by Lopros, but the preemptive attack from Babil II will teach the place on the contrary.

title: Android 2-stage attack
overview: A new kind of virus weapon X3 developed by Yomi's subordinates. The whole world is in a big fuss because California oranges are contaminated with this virus. Moreover, Yomi's subordinates pretended to be witnesses and testified that Babil II sprayed this virus, so it was regarded as an enemy by people all over the world.

title: Robot Electric Transmission Machine X1
overview: An old man who fell down in the desert. It was Dr. Roald Dali, one of the world's leading scientists who went missing two years ago. The doctor, who was captured by Yomi, was involved in the development of a mechanical machine X1 that can copy a combat robot and can be teleported at any size, and he was tormented with guilt and decided to escape.

title: Take back the artificial satellite
overview: A satellite that deviated from orbit crashed in Japan. The military was supposed to recover it, but it was attacked by a fighter under Yomi and robbed of the satellite. In fact, the artificial satellite had a new induction device built in, and it was a ridiculous thing that you could bomb it anywhere you want from space.

title: is in danger!! Lopros, a monster bird
overview: The dragon that raided the Eskimos. It was a new robot weapon developed by Yomi for anti-Lopoulos. While making Babil II, who rushed to the site, attack bear-type robots and seal-type robots, Yomi was looking for weaknesses from the battle data with Lopros. However, as I knew that I couldn't find a weakness, I started an all-out attack.

title: Notre Dame Madness Case
overview: The mysterious luminous panic that hit Paris. This phenomenon that explodes when you think that the headlights of the car suddenly emitted a fierce light was once again the work of Yomi. However, the operation was not yet in the execution stage, and it was an incident that happened because Professor Saint-Claire, who was leading the operation, accidentally touched the device.

title: Phantom 100 trillion yen
overview: A fake bill that was suddenly scattered all over the city. It was so elaborate that even if an expert appraised it, he wouldn't know it was a fake tag. If this flows to the market, there will definitely be a financial panic and Japan will be economically devastated. But Yomi, who made a fake bill, threatened the director of the National Security Bureau.

title: The Challenge of Makurayami
overview: A mysterious power outage incident that hit all over the world. This simultaneous panic literally paralyzed social life. Moreover, major cities in the world become lawless areas, such as robbers taking advantage of the darkness. Meanwhile, Babil II, who was ordered by Yomi, the ringleader of the incident, to come to the North Pole, was sentenced to crush each other there.

title: The Whistling Demons
overview: The people who were watching TV suddenly became violent. People who had been living a normal social life until then, but panicked because they changed like "Jikil and Hyde". At that time, Babil II, who embarked on an investigation, found that Tokyo Tower was the source of violent sound waves, but even Rodem was driven crazy and forced to withdraw temporarily.

title: Attack of the Mammoth Gorilla
overview: A mammoth gorilla appeared in the jungle of New Guinea and attacked the residents. Babil II, who was lured out by Yomi, meets Ami, a girl who is the victim, and Shirakawa, a Japanese doctor, his younger brother Pero, who was in danger of blindness due to the attack. In fact, he was a former teacher of Yumiko Shirakawa's father, and here he was a famous doctor called Shubaizer in Japan.

title: The Terrified Space Operation
overview: A meteorite fell on the Arabian Sea. Babil II, who embarked on an investigation at Poseidon, learns that it is an artificial meteorite and Yomi developed a meteorite bomb. If countless meteorites drifting in space are misused, the earth will be quickly overrun by Yomi ... Babil II, who has a sense of crisis, rushed to a tent village in a certain country relying on the mysterious telepathy that calls him.

title: The Baby is a psychic
overview: A baby with mysterious power that is famous in the neighborhood of the Komi family. Yomi looked at the baby. Babil II desperately pursues its whereabouts when he learns that a baby with the same telepathic ability as himself has been taken away by Yomi. However, it collapses due to the damage caused by the attack of the tank unit.

title: Deep Sea Crab Robot
overview: The construction plan of a seabed city that was underway on the seabed of the Sea of Japan. However, Yomi, who already had an undersea base, sent a huge crab robot and destroyed the base under construction. Babil II, who reunited with the Chief Security Bureau, begins to take action to defeat the crab robot and remove Yomi's interference.

title: Invitation from the Dead
overview: A mysterious telepathy sent to Babil II and Yomi at the same time. Babil II discovers that it is emanated from a volcanic island and discovers an old man with powerful supernatural powers Dr. Salz. However, the old man had already run out of life, and he was sending telepathy only with residual thoughts using a mental power amplifier.

title: Eternal City Frozen Zarrow
overview: Yomi's subordinate, Golda, discovered the ancient civilized city of Zorou. Golda, who originally became a subordinate as a human being, gained the ability to move at an unstoppable speed by the accelerator discovered at the ruins of Zorou. He is no longer challenging Bavill II with his ability to surpass cyborg warriors and psychic soldiers.

title: Operation V of Death
overview: In order to kill Babil II, Yomi built the ultimate machine. Its name is "V"! It is Yomi's trump card that stole a large amount of high-performance LSI that makes even the TV palm-sized and finally completed it. Yomi, who launched the newly completed V, succeeds in causing great damage to Babil II, who followed him to the secret base.

title: Total Attack Babil II
overview: Yomi took LSD in order to make a secret weapon "telepathic amplification device" higher than V! Babil II, who recovered Lopros and Poseidon while rushing to repair the tower, is revealed by Yomi in the decisive battle he challenged. And he challenged Yomi with his whole body and soul, who tried to manipulate three servants with telepathic abilities more than Babil II.

title: A New Fight
overview: Koichi finally returned to Japan on the Babil II. However, he suddenly fainted from the fatigue of the fierce battle and crashed in Hokkaido. So I picked him up and took care of him, Yuki, a girl from the ranch, and her grandfather, Kotaro. Koichi was troublesome for a while just telling Yuki, who is active and not shy, his name...

title: The Golden Amoebas
overview: In the ranch life with Yuki, Babil II secretly reunited with three servants. Lopros is in the ice cave, Poseidon is in the lake, and Rodem is always around Babel II. The Babil II was also revived with the automatic restoration system, and the Babil II team was already completely revived.

title: The Guitar that Calls Death
overview: Joe, a boy under Yomi who controls the giant robot Titan with a guitar. He pretends to want to work at the ranch and pretends to be a normal boy and comes to Yuki's ranch. The purpose, of course, is to eliminate Babil II, who was beginning to get used to life on the ranch. What will you do, Babil II?

title: The Assassination Phantom of a Robot
overview: Yomi's subordinate Zazan's mysterious robot that becomes a disk by combining. Babil II rushed from a ranch in Hokkaido, where he was staying, to stop the mysterious robot that appeared at the airport and rampaged around. However, it is Zazan's clever lure operation, and it is attacked again near the ranch by a transmitter secretly attached to the Babil II.

title: Dead Horse Blue Pegasus
overview: Suddenly, a mysterious blue Pegasus with an eyepatch appeared at the Watari Ranch where Babil II lived. The blue Pegasus manipulates horses in the ranch and tries to commit suicide by mass flooding a nearby lake. In fact, this Blue Pegasus was made to kill a person Yomi doesn't like in Jacob, a pawn of researcher under Yomi.

title: Dust Devil Operation Ashes of death
overview: A mysterious monster tornado that often exists in the world. " The phenomenon called "Dust Devil" boasts a terrible power both in scale and destructive power, and made me feel the threat of nature. However, there is also a theory that the cause of the occurrence is due to the results of the atomic bomb experiment, and Babil II immediately starts an investigation.

title: The fear of the witch
overview: An eerie Western-style building quietly standing in the forest near Watari Ranch. The one who lived there was a witch, a witch who controlled a cyborg bat. It's as if she makes me think of a vampire, and when she manipulates Yuki and Chibo who got lost in a Western-style house and lure Babil II, she challenges to bury him.

title: Snow Hunter Falling in Summer
overview: A location team came to Watari Ranch. Because as a stuntman of a movie starring popular actress Kaoru Nanjo, Yuki was shot with a white arrow. However, the scene is in chaos because it snows out of season and Yuki is lifted into the air with a horse.

title: Crazy Queen Bee
overview: The queen of the Barcerose Kingdom was stabbed to death. Yomi and her subordinates were pulling their hands behind the scenes. I created a killer bee, and now I was trying to create a new toxin that would corrode even metal. However, a murder bee began to rampage in Japan due to an accident during transportation, and its existence is finally found out by Babil II, who started investigating.

title: Yomi's Secret Weapon Goriki 2
overview: A cyborg glider unit that suddenly attacked Babil II. It is Yomi's attempt to exhaust her psychic powers and attack her with her favorite new monster robot Goriki No. 2. Yomi, who lure Babil II off the coast of an uninhabited island, disassembled the body of Goriki 2 and developed an attack for each part.

title: The Mysterious Alien Epsilon
overview: Suddenly, a mysterious spaceship Epsilon people flew around the world's military bases and said that they would be friendly with human beings on earth. Human beings gradually relieve tension with their beautiful appearance and gentle tone. Yuki also begins to trust the girls who have recovered the sickbed Chibo immediately with their mysterious ability...

title: Tokyo Underground Occupation Operation
overview: Finally, Yomi got serious. All subways in the city center are forcibly suppressed by Yomi's subordinates, and all the passengers, including Yuki, Chibo, and Kotaro, who came to Tokyo, are locked up there. Yomi's request is to gather world leaders in Tokyo within 24 hours. Therefore, they return the Assault Force of the National Security Bureau and stay underground.

title: Babil II vs. Yomi
overview: Babil II said goodbye to Yuki and returned to the subway yard where Yomi was waiting. The security bureau, which had no choice but to comply with Yomi's request to send the leaders of various countries, entrusted everything to Babil II and put the leaders on the designated subway car. And the last battle between Babil II and Yomi began.
